title: polybotrya sinensis
intro: Polybotrya sinensis, also known as Chinese liver fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Polybotrya sinensis include protecting the liver from damage, reducing inflammation and pain, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which are commonly used to treat liver-related ailments and other health conditions.
